zyrenAIDesc: Learn about Threshold's artificial intelligence, its origin and capabilities

faq.question: How do I change my password?
faq.answer: Go to Security & Account > Change password from the settings screen.

faq.question: What is the profile PIN for?
faq.answer: It is a unique code you share with classmates to join collaborative study groups.

faq.question: How do grading scales work?
faq.answer: You can select from predefined scales or create a custom one in Academic Preferences.

faq.question: Is my data backed up to the cloud?
faq.answer: Yes, enable "Cloud Backup" to back up your files to Uploadthing.

faq.question: How do I delete my account?
faq.answer: Go to Security & Account > Delete account. You have 14 days to recover it.

leaveGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave group {{pin}}?

notifDeadlineDisabledMsg: You will no longer receive deadline alerts.
notifWeeklyDisabledMsg: You will no longer receive the weekly summary.

weeklySummaryDesc: You will receive a weekly summary of your academic performance.
pinFixedWarning: Once saved, the PIN cannot be modified.
publicGroupDesc: Anyone can join with the PIN

zyren.cognitiveCore: Zyren — The Cognitive Core of Threshold
zyren.desc1: Zyren is the cognitive identity of the artificial intelligence integrated into Threshold, a platform focused on analyzing, interpreting, and transforming academic material into structured, usable knowledge.
zyren.desc2: It is not a generic chatbot. It is an analysis system, a synthesis engine, an entity designed to interpret academic content objectively and in a structured way.
zyren.nameOrigin1: Zyren was born as a technical and conceptual neologism, designed to convey precision, structured intelligence, and knowledge transformation.
zyren.nameOrigin2: The prefix "Zy-" conveys modernity, technological abstraction, and artificial identity. The letter Z, uncommon in natural language, creates high memorability and a futuristic feel.
zyren.nameOrigin3: The suffix "-ren" provides phonetic stability, a sense of structured entity, and technical character.
zyren.nameOrigin4: The name represents the intelligence that transforms information into understanding.

capability.chat: Interactive academic chat with persistent context and ultra-fast responses (Groq 300+ tokens/s).
capability.flashcards: Automatic flashcard generation from text, PDF, audio, video, and images.
capability.documents: Document processing up to 100 MB (PDFs, books, notes).
capability.transcription: Audio transcription with Groq Whisper v3 (multilingual, focused on Spanish).
capability.youtube: YouTube video transcription and analysis with automatic flashcard generation.
capability.vision: Image, chart, diagram, and equation analysis with computer vision.
capability.summaries: Smart summaries that reduce extensive content to key points.
capability.intentDetection: Intelligent intent detection — understands what you want without explicit instructions.
capability.dualModel: Dual model support (Groq for fast responses, Gemini for large documents).

zyren.rel1: Threshold defines the boundary, the transition point between information and understanding.
zyren.rel2: Zyren is the intelligence that crosses that threshold and executes the transformation.
zyren.rel3: Together they turn documents into knowledge, organize ideas, and make learning navigable.
zyren.final: Zyren does not replace the teacher. It accelerates learning by transforming content into structured, accessible, and effective study tools.

localAI.title: Local AI Engine
localAI.desc: Download models to run AI completely offline on your device
localAI.masterSwitchDesc: Use local models exclusively, even if you have internet. All AI operations will run on-device.
localAI.offlineWarning: No active model. Download one below to use AI offline.
localAI.essentialDesc: The fastest and lightest model. Ideal for low-memory phones, short summaries, and direct answers.
localAI.advancedDesc: The standard model. Good at everything: flashcard generation, creative writing, and general reading comprehension.
localAI.qwen15Desc: Language specialist. The best option for grammar, translations, and perfect natural writing.
localAI.qwen3Desc: The best for computer science. Excellent at writing code, debugging, and explaining algorithms.
localAI.phiDesc: The king of logical analysis. Specialized in solving equations, physics, and explaining math step-by-step.
localAI.gemmaDesc: The best contextual memory. Ideal for asking questions about long documents, books, or extensive notes.
localAI.downloadConfirmMsgEssential: Essential (~800 MB) — sufficient for summaries and basic queries.
localAI.downloadConfirmMsgAdvanced: Advanced (~2 GB) — best quality for complex analysis and reasoning.
localAI.downloadWifiConfirm: Download over Wi-Fi is recommended for files over 100 MB.
localAI.ramMin: Requires at least 2 GB of free RAM
localAI.purgeConfirm: This will clear all downloaded AI models. You will need to download them again.
localAI.privacyDesc: Your data never leaves your device when using local models.
localAI.offlineBannerPrivacy: Your data never touches the internet. Everything is processed within your phone.
localAI.offlineBannerTradeoff: By activating this mode, you sacrifice speed and power: responses will take a bit longer and the AI engine will use a lighter model with less academic precision than cloud mode.
localAI.whisperDesc: Download Whisper Tiny (~75 MB) to transcribe audio recordings offline using the on-device AI engine.
